title: [Good news] Comrade Yue Yunbo, a senior executive of Tianhui Group, was officially appointed as the vice chairman of the Haigang District Council of Non-Party Intellectuals and New Social Classes and the Chairman of the Council of Private Enterprises and Foreign Enterprises
contentHtml:
On November 28, Haigang District held the founding meeting of the Association of Non-Party Intellectuals and New Social Classes. The meeting invited more than 100 non-party intellectuals from all walks of life in Haigang District and representatives of new social classes to participate, and leaders of other county and district United Front Departments were specially invited to observe. The meeting was chaired by Gao Yonglin, member of the Standing Committee of the District Party Committee and Minister of United Front Work.Xie Haimei, a third-level researcher from the United Front Work Department of the Municipal Party Committee, attended the meeting to congratulate and deliver a speech. Fan Haitao, Secretary of the District Party Committee, delivered an important speech.

Comrade Yue Yunbo, an executive of Tianhui Group, was officially appointed as the vice chairman of the Haigang District Council of Non-Party Intellectuals and New Social Classes and the chairman of the Council of Private Enterprises and Foreign Enterprises. The establishment of the Association of Non-Party Intellectuals and New Social Classes is conducive to consolidating and strengthening the cause of the United Front and improving the work pattern of the United Front; it is conducive to conscientiously conducting investigations and research around people's livelihood and actively participating in politics and deliberation; it is conducive to straightening out communication channels, truly realizing unimpeded access to opinions and suggestions from the broad masses of intellectuals and people from all walks of life.
titleZh: 【喜报】天晖集团高管岳云波同志被正式任命为海港区党外知识分子和新的社会阶层人士理事会副会长及民企和外企理事会会长
contentHtmlZh:
11月28日，海港区召开党外知识分子和新的社会阶层人士联谊会成立大会。会议邀请了100余名海港区社会各界党外知识分子和新的社会阶层人士代表参加，特邀其他县区统战部主管领导列席观摩。会议由区委常委、统战部长高永林主持，市委统战部三级调研员谢海梅到会祝贺并致辞，区委书记樊海涛作重要讲话。

天晖集团高管岳云波同志被正式任命为海港区党外知识分子和新的社会阶层人士理事会副会长及民企和外企理事会会长。党外知识分子和新的社会阶层人士联谊会的成立，有利于巩固壮大统一战线事业、完善大统战工作格局；有利于围绕百姓民生，认真开展调查研究，积极参政议政；有利于理顺沟通渠道，真正实现广大知识分子和社会各阶层人士的意见建议畅通无阻。
